Home > AI Music > Suno

Suno

★★★★☆ 50 credits daily, 10 songs/day Paid from: $8/month (Pro)

Visit official site →

The world's most popular AI music generator. Type a prompt and get a complete song with lyrics, melody, and vocals. Free plan: 50 credits daily (10 songs).

Suno Free Credits Details

  • Amount: 50 credits daily, 10 songs
  • Reset: Resets daily
  • Watermark: No
  • Commercial: Free plan: no commercial use

Suno Key Features

  • Generate complete songs from text prompts
  • Multiple genres: pop, rock, electronic, rap and more
  • Free plan includes v4.5 model
  • Pro plan unlocks top-tier v5.5 model
  • Upload your own audio for remixing
  • Split tracks into vocals and instruments

Pros

  • Generous free tier (10 songs/day)
  • Industry-leading music quality
  • Zero learning curve
  • Supports Chinese lyrics

Cons

  • Free plan: no commercial use
  • Standard audio quality on free plan
  • Songs limited to ~2 minutes

Tips

  • English prompts work better
  • More detailed prompts = higher quality
  • Free plan fine for personal use, upgrade for commercial
